column2: with ALT: delta per Harvey Ball
Show distance from the respective center points.
Show distance from left edge to left edge.
Show distance from top edge to top edge.
Show distance from right edge to left edge.
Show distance from right edge to right edge.
Show distance from bottom edge to top edge.
Show distance from bottom edge to bottom edge.
Distance from visual right edge to visual left edge. Helpful for rotated shapes.
Show distance from visual bottom edge to visual top edge. Helpful for rotated shapes.
Distance/angle individually from center to shapes (default)
Always change distances/angles by an equal difference [ALT]
Update agenda and replace with the agenda on the agenda main slide; slides are recreated in the process.
Agenda, slide numbering, slide-deck cleanup, and many more slide-related functions
Activate linking of the input fields. Horizontal and vertical spacing between rows and columns stays the same.
Activates a small floating mini toolbar with an interactive color picker. The `ppt_quickedit` feature must be installed.
Activated when the first selected shape is flipped horizontally
Activated when the first selected shape is flipped vertically
Update the connection area after the connected shapes have changed.
Update of slide thumbnails on this slide or in the entire presentation
Add current selection to the favorites library
Copy current slide to create an updatable slide thumbnail.
Replace current slide reference with the copied slide from the clipboard.
Reduce current selection by the selected range (complement).
Temporarily store the current selection to restore it later.
Hide the current sheet or the selected sheets.
Make the current sheet or the selected sheets very hidden (xlVeryHidden) so they can only be made visible again via the toolbox or a macro.
Remove all agendas from the presentation
Close all workbooks except the current one. If there are unsaved changes, a prompt appears first.
Select all image files to insert individually.
Sort all sheets according to the selection. The selection must consist of exactly one column with the sheet names in the desired order.

Rename all sheets according to the selection. The selection must consist of exactly 2 columns, where the first column contains the old name and the second column the new name. Empty names are skipped.

All caches are reset. Library folders and files are each re-indexed the next time they are opened.\n\nOnly thumbnails of already-opened libraries are updated. Thumbnails can also be regenerated separately for each shape-library file (in the respective menu).
Set all properties of all linked shapes like the selected shape.
Match all properties of linked shapes
Delete all settings and reload BKT
Select all elements of the group
Split all results/groups of a regular expression for the selected cells into columns.
Append all slides from multiple PowerPoint files to this presentation
Append all slides from multiple PowerPoint files to this presentation.
Save all slides as individual PowerPoint files in the selected folder
Save all slides as individual PowerPoint files in the selected folder.
Update all slide thumbnails on the selected slides. The thumbnail must have been inserted beforehand with this function. If the slide comes from another file, it is automatically opened briefly.
Update all slide thumbnails in the presentation. The thumbnail must have been inserted beforehand with this function. If the slide comes from another file, it is automatically opened briefly.
Convert all slide thumbnails in the presentation into normal images that can no longer be updated.
Show all slide numbers with linked shapes
Remove all notes on all slides.
Temporarily hide and show all notes on all slides.
Remove all notes on the current slide.
Temporarily hide and show all notes on the current slide.
Show and hide all shapes in the slide master to work on slides undisturbed and confidentially.
Format all shapes like the shape under the cursor when the context menu is opened
Format all shapes like the first selected shape
Select all columns of the currently selected cells.
Hide all columns and rows of the unused range.
Update all thumbnails on the current or selected slide(s)
Update all thumbnails in the entire presentation
Remove all connection points of the selected shapes
Copy all connection points of the master shape (thick border) to other shapes
Copy all connection points of the selected shape
Select all rows of the currently selected cells.
Select all cells with the same background color as the selected cells.
Toggle all hidden sheets between shown and hidden.\n\nIf no sheets are hidden, the selected sheets or the current sheet are hidden.
Show all hidden columns and rows again.
Toggle all hidden columns between hidden and shown.\n\nIf no hidden columns are stored or present in the sheet, and columns are selected, these are hidden.
Toggle all hidden rows between hidden and shown.\n\nIf no hidden rows are stored or present in the sheet, and rows are selected, these are hidden.
Show all hidden or very hidden (xlVeryHidden) sheets again.
Select all empty columns within the used cells (UsedRange).
Select all empty rows within the used cells (UsedRange).
Delete all linked shapes on all slides.
Replace all linked shapes on all slides with the reference shape (by default the selected shape).
Replace all linked shapes on all slides with the selected shape.
Send all linked shapes to back
Bring all linked shapes to front
Delete or align all linked shapes. Options are also available in the context menu of linked shapes.
Toggle all very hidden (xlVeryHidden) sheets between shown and hidden.\n\nIf no sheets are hidden, the selected sheets or the current sheet are hidden.
Show all very hidden sheets (xlVeryHidden only)
Insert as an updatable slide thumbnail in PNG format

Handles affect the shape form, e.g. the rounding at corners or the tip of arrows. Depending on the shape type, there can be up to 8 handle values that can be set manually. Here you can toggle between the values in pairs.
Adjust handle values no. 1 and 2 in spinner boxes
Adjust handle values no. 3 and 4 in spinner boxes
Adjust handle values no. 5 and 6 in spinner boxes
Adjust handle values no. 7 and 8 in spinner boxes
